nasb.text: So Abimelech came to the tower and fought against it, and approached the entrance of the tower to burn it with fire.

esv.text: And Abimelech came to the tower and fought against it and drew near to the door of the tower to burn it with fire.

cnv.text: 亞比米勒到了城樓前，攻打城樓；他走近城樓門口，要用火焚燒。

ccb.text: 亚比米勒攻打城楼，走到城楼门口正准备放火时，
